VPN into client/Log into Meraki portal depending on device

If down, verify ISP is showing site as up.
If ISP shows down, begin crisis management, Validate power on device with client
If power is good, warm handoff to IS - Networking team
If you cannot contact the client, hold off on warm handoff until Power can be verified.
